Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Alabama Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Monticello
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker: High School Bassin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Hartwell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: This week on larry smith the dynamic duo is back for an action packed walleye show out on the bay of green bay
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | EARLY Spring Walleyes Oconto
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: U.S. Marine James Turner signed up to serve at just 13 years old. Inspired by the events of 9-11, this Marine faced his toughest battle after returning home. Host Ben Olsen leads him to Minnesota bass as James tells his story.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran James Turner
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Blackbirch Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lanier Spotted Bass
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lanier Spotted Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: South Dakota’s scenic Lake Oahe sets the stage for this week’s episode. Although well known as a walleye fishery, Kim and Cheyenne Ridge Signature Lodge, General Manager, Sean Finley reveal the under-utilized fishery within the overpopulation of smallmouth bass and respectable northern pike. Strike King’s Dream Shot Worm is the featured lure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Hunger is the Best Pickle
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shore Fishing Walleye on Abitibi Lake north of Cochrane, Ontario, with Dunn Right Outfitters.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Shore Fishing Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the best Sportfishing in the world takes place in Costa Rica. Especially out of a village named Nosara. The Nosara area is far from commercial fishing lanes and off tourists' beaten paths and is a best kept secret fishing and surfing destination. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we fish for Tuna, Billfish, and Dorado.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica's Best Kept Fishing Secret, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest Beau Meyer are in the high Colorado mountains chasing the trout now that the ice is off
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Icy Colorado Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The significance of baitfish size is investigated as Strike King Marketing Relationship Manager, Mark Copley accompanies Kim on Parksville Reservoir. The two cast a KVD Jerkbait for schooling spotted bass and discover a forage variance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — A Matter of Size
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim targets groups of smallmouth bass along the Lake St. Clair Flats with a Strike King "Shadalicious" swimbait. Then dives in to reveal what these fish are positioned around.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook n' Look — Shadalicious and Feeding Fishes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Retired Colonel Paul Wharton shares his memories of leading his soldiers while teaching his own children the philosophy of “ mission, men and me."
Video.grandparentTitle: Paul Wharton
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Since his high school sports days, James Elkins has been a team leader. An early interest in the Army led the Alaskan teenager to finish college and head off to Army Ranger school. In Afghanistan, a gunshot wound to the head wasn't enough to quell the spirit of this Ranger, and his positive attitude continues to pay off.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Ranger James Elkins
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's Musky time! This week, we're meeting up with our good friend Jeff Van Remortel to try and catch a giant! Big fish, great tips, and good times this week, so hang onto your hineys!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Big Water Muskies

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains where to find bass under bluebird skies
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Bluebird Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin shows the best spots and baits for bass during the shad spawn.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Early Summer Feed
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing with Dennis Tieje in Louisiana
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Grosse Savanne
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing in Florida with Roland Martin
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Two Legends
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with the most celebrated mind in Bass Fishing, Drew Gill. In depth conversation about his forward-facing sonar set up and strategy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Drew Gill
Video.title: Episode 1
